race.comment: FOUR DOZEN OYSTERS (2) turned in a decent effort last start to finish second over 1890m at this track after being prominent at the turn. Suitably placed in this line-up so anticipating another big run. STRIKE ME PINK (14) finished fourth last time out over 1890m at this circuit. Has a sound record here with three top-three finishes from five starts and looks ready for that breakthrough win. CLENCH (1) finished 3 lengths away in fourth last time out over 1400m at Sunshine Coast Poly after being prominent at the turn three weeks ago. Steps up in distance today and should play a role in the outcome. I'M SO ELEGANT (10) has been in the money three times including last start on May 23 when third over 1890m at this venue. Worth including in calculations.
